title: quercus phellos var. myrtifolia
intro: Quercus phellos var. myrtifolia, also known as the willow-leaf oak, is a variety of the willow oak tree that is native to eastern North America. The medicinal properties of Quercus phellos var. myrtifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an astringent, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Quercus phellos var. myrtifolia can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
